segments.text: Honestly, it's arguably the move with the best return on investment as a starter
segments.original_text: 本当に始動技として一番リターン高いと言っても過言ではないぐらいの技なんで

segments.text: Bayonetta definitely wants to use it the most, but
segments.original_text: ベオネッタが一番振りたい技ではあるんですけど

segments.text: You've got to respect the serious KO risk against that
segments.original_text: そこに対してしっかりと撃墜のリスクを

full_text: Honestly, it's arguably the move with the best return on investment as a starter Bayonetta definitely wants to use it the most, but You've got to respect the serious KO risk against that
